response.justification: Candidate is a Staff/Senior-level engineer with 15+ years of experience applying for an entry-level junior/mid role. The technical skills (TypeScript, React, Node.js, PostgreSQL-adjacent SQL) clearly exceed the requirements, but this creates significant overqualification risk: likely salary mismatch, high flight risk, and poor fit for a role designed for someone taking progressively more responsibility. No demonstrated interest in the renewable energy/construction domain, and Berlin-based which fits on-site requirement but seniority gap is too large.
strengths: Strong TypeScript/Node.js/React fullstack experience across multiple companies
Berlin-based, meeting the on-site presence requirement
Demonstrated learning ability across many languages, stacks, and domains
concerns: Severely overqualified — Staff/Senior engineer applying to entry-level position
High flight risk and likely salary expectations far above junior band
No PostgreSQL or Nest.js experience explicitly listed (uses MongoDB primarily)
